data.title: Microservice Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp utilizes a microservice architecture to handle different functionalities like messaging, media sharing, and authentication.
data.technical_spec: Decoupled services communicating over HTTP/REST APIs.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All messages, calls, photos, and videos sent on WhatsApp are secured with end-to-end encryption.

data.title: Database Management
data.description: WhatsApp uses multiple databases to handle user data, message data, and media storage.
data.technical_spec: Primarily uses SQL databases and NoSQL for media storage.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: WhatsApp employs load balancing to distribute incoming connection requests effectively.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes DNS and server-side load balancing.

data.title: Scalability Solutions
data.description: WhatsApp's architecture is built to support millions of concurrent connections globally.
